files.notes: This file contains two distinct sections: 1) Notes from the Field by Amy Brown Lyman covering Relief Society activities across various stakes, and 2) Guide Lessons for April containing four weekly lessons on Theology, Work and Business, Literature (James Whitcomb Riley), and Social Service. The boundary occurs where the Notes section ends with organizational updates and the Guide Lessons section begins with 'LESSON I'.
